    {"id": "c-principle-lawful", "name": "Lawful and respectful of our Nation's values", "aliases": ["lawful principle"], "description": "Principle: agencies shall use AI in a manner consistent with the Constitution and applicable laws and policies.", "grounding_span": "(a) Lawful and respectful of our Nation’s values.     {"id": "c-principle-purposeful", "name": "Purposeful and performance-driven", "aliases": ["purposeful principle"], "description": "Principle: agencies shall pursue AI where benefits significantly outweigh assessable, manageable risks.", "grounding_span": "(b) Purposeful and performance-driven.     {"id": "c-principle-accurate", "name": "Accurate, reliable, and effective", "aliases": ["accuracy principle"], "description": "Principle: AI application must be consistent with the use cases for which it was trained and be accurate, reliable, and effective.", "grounding_span": "(c) Accurate, reliable, and effective.     {"id": "c-principle-safe", "name": "Safe, secure, and resilient", "aliases": ["safety principle"], "description": "Principle: agencies shall ensure safety, security, and resilience against vulnerabilities and adversarial manipulation.", "grounding_span": "(d) Safe, secure, and resilient.     {"id": "c-principle-understandable", "name": "Understandable", "aliases": ["understandability principle"], "description": "Principle: operations and outcomes of AI must be sufficiently understandable by experts, users, and others.", "grounding_span": "(e) Understandable.     {"id": "c-principle-responsible", "name": "Responsible and traceable", "aliases": ["traceability principle"], "description": "Principle: human roles and responsibilities are clearly defined, and AI use is well documented and traceable.", "grounding_span": "(f) Responsible and traceable.     {"id": "c-principle-monitored", "name": "Regularly monitored", "aliases": ["monitoring principle"], "description": "Principle: AI applications are regularly tested against the Principles with mechanisms to supersede or deactivate them.", "grounding_span": "(g) Regularly monitored.     {"id": "c-principle-transparent", "name": "Transparent", "aliases": ["transparency principle"], "description": "Principle: agencies disclose relevant information about their AI use to stakeholders including Congress and the public.", "grounding_span": "(h) Transparent.     {"suggested_edge": "complements", "from_id": "fw-principles", "to_id": "fw-dod", "grounding_span": "Section 3 of this order establishes additional principles (Principles) for the", "location": "Sec. 1", "note": "The order frames its Sec. 3 Principles as 'additional' principles alongside existing DoD/ODNI AI-ethics guidance for national-security contexts; no allowed edge captures 'additional-to / complements'."},
    {"suggested_edge": "specified_by", "from_id": "c-agency-inventory", "to_id": "c-cio-council", "grounding_span": "identify, provide guidance on, and make publicly available the criteria,", "location": "Sec. 5(a)", "note": "The CIO Council sets the criteria, format, and mechanisms that govern the agency AI use-case inventory; the schema has no Concept→Concept 'governed-by / specified-by' edge."},
    {"suggested_edge": "excludes_from_scope", "from_id": "executive-order-13960-promoting-the-use-of-trustworthy-ai-in", "to_id": "c-ai-rnd", "grounding_span": "(iii) AI research and development (R&D) activities, although the Principles", "location": "Sec. 9(d)(iii)", "note": "The order explicitly excludes AI R&D, national-security AI, and AI embedded in common commercial products from its scope; there is no Document→Concept 'excludes' edge in the allowed set."},
    {"suggested_edge": "precedes_in_workflow", "from_id": "c-agency-inventory", "to_id": "c-responsible-official", "grounding_span": "must be approved by the agency-designated responsible official(s), as de-", "location": "Sec. 5(c)(i)", "note": "Inventory-derived remediation plans must be approved by the responsible official within 120 days; a procedural sequencing relation that 'precedes' (Concept→Concept temporal) only loosely fits."}
